title: Supercharge Your Monday.com Workspace with 12+ Seamless Embeds 🚀

posts.author: Satisfaction-Drivers (Satisfaction Drivers)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Monday Users,

We’re excited to introduce our complete suite of Monday.com embed apps—built to bring all your favorite tools directly inside your Monday workspace.

From design to scheduling to data dashboards, our apps make collaboration smoother and smarter. No more tab-switching. Just seamless workflows.

Explore our Embed Apps:

  • Loom – Share videos directly in boards
  • Trello – Sync boards for unified task management
  • Google Calendar – Keep your schedule in sync
  • Google Forms – Collect responses within Monday
  • Google Docs – Edit docs inside your workspace
  • Google Sheets – Sync and view sheets in real time
  • Google Slides – Present slides from within Monday
  • Google Apps – Streamline Google Apps Integration
  • Figma – Embed and collaborate on designs
  • Canva – Design and share assets with ease
  • Calendly – Manage meeting links and bookings
  • Looker Studio – View dashboards and reports directly

All apps are plug-and-play, no complex setup required.

Explore them now: monday.com Marketplace

Need help getting started? Just reply to this email—we’re happy to help!

Best,
Mayank
Satisfaction Drivers
tech@satisfactiondrivers.com
